Exterior Interior Limited, Delhi provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. It provides 26 courses across specialisations such as 3DS Max, Apparel Design, Jewellery Design, Photoshop and UI / UX. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., UG Diploma and Certificate. The student intake for these courses is 20. Exterior Interior Limited, Delhi offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design and Animation. Exterior Interior Limited, Delhi offers all the campus facilities to students.

Exterior Interior Limited, Delhi has well stocked Library, Wi-Fi Campus, Hostel and Lab facility for its students. The Labs have Individual drawing board, French curve and flexi curve protractor, LED presentation for 3D modeling and live projects, Air-conditioned design studios.

faqs.answer:
Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.
Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: 1. 20–30% of students only get placed here. 2. The highest package is 600000, the lowest is 100000 and the average package is 300000. 3. Sports and games are great in college.

course_faqs.question: Does NIELIT Calicut offers scholarships to M.Tech students?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Calicut does offer scholarships to M.Tech students in the form of an assistantship. Moreover, to get this scholarship, candidates are required to follow certain eligibility criteria mentioned in the official sources. Additionally, the stipend offered by the scholarship is disbursed directly to the student's bank account via the AICTE-Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) portal. The payment is based on monthly attendance.

overview_faqs.question: Is National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology, Calicut a good college for M.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology Calicut is considered a good college for pursuing an MTech. NIELIT Calicut offers PG, Diploma and short-term courses in the fields of Computer Application, Technology, Science, etc. Further, the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut offers online courses for students and professionals in the field of Science and Technology. Also, NIELIT Calicut has a practical-oriented curriculum, strong faculty with industry experience, and good placement opportunities in related sectors such as embedded systems development.

overview_faqs.question: Is NIELIT Calicut a good college for M.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Calicut is considered a good option for M.Tech, specially for electronics and information technology. They offer programs in Embedded Systems and Electronic Design Technology, and the college has a strong facilities for it's programs. Admission to the NIELIT IS based on GATE scores and interviews.

overview_faqs.question: Is the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut is a good college. National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut is a part of NIELIT group. National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology was established in 1989. The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology offers 24 courses in two streams and seven specialisations. The courses offered by the institute are as Postgraduate, Postgraduation Diploma, advancedDiplomaand a doctorate course. The highest salary offered by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology in 2018 was INR 7.50 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: How is the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Calicut for M.Tech courses?
overview_faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut offers Master of Technology courses in two different specialisations including MTech in Embedded Systems and MTech in Electronics Design and Technology. The duration of the course is two years. The total tuition fee for the Master of Technology courses is INR 2.69 lakh (for 2 years). Refundable caution deposit INR 5000 (included in total fee). The project work of two-semester duration is part of the course and can be done in an Industry or National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut during the third and fourth semesters.

The mode of application at NIELIT Calicut is online. NIELIT Calicut MTech admission is done basis the GATE entrance exam score. faqs.question: Does NIELIT Calicut offer placements to its students?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT has a dedicated training and placement cell that offers placement assistance to students. The leading recruiters of NIELIT Calicut include companies such as GE Power Controls, Wipro and Texas Instruments.

faqs.question: How are M Tech placements at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology calicut?
faqs.answer: Grads of M.Tech usually have a placement rate of between 60% and 70% at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut. The program in question and industry demand determine how much changes in this. Numerous IT and electronics firms, along with TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, Accenture, and Cognizant, have reported a number of good placements. Graduates with an M.Tech typically receive packages ranging from 3 to 4.5 LPA at the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Calicut. Despite its shortcomings, this is still a respectable place to start your career and is still considered to be good. Placements in the electronics and IT sectors are currently impacted by the need for specific skills and knowledge.

faqs.question: Are M.Tech placements at NIELIT Calicut good?
faqs.answer: M.Tech placements at NIELIT Calicut are are very good. The placement rate for M.Tech graduates from NIELIT Calicut ranges between 60% and 70%. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, IBM, Accenture, and Cognizant are among the firms that offer good placements to graduates, with packages ranging from 3 to 4.5 LPA.

Most of the time, the library remains closed. Even for academic preparation, the number of books is very low. There are only 1-3 books, and for some subjects, books are not even available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Arti?cial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The Mystic College aura breaks up the reality we expect but makes us encounter the ground facts.

content.Placements: Our college placement is so good that every 4th-year student is also eligible for this placement, and companies come to our college offering salaries of 500000 Lacs per annum. When students enter the 7th semester, the college offers on-campus placements. Our college also provides internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: I chose this course because Computer Science & Engineering is trending now. Our student-to-faculty ratio is 120:4. Every faculty member is highly educated and experienced in this syllabus. As our professors are friendly and help us, it's easy to score good marks in semester exams. Our college has separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostels provide two meals a day, a double-sitter room, and a study table.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Students who don't want compulsory attendance criteria can join here.

content.Placements: There were 50% of the students who get placed in our department. The highest package was INR 30,000 per month, and the lowest was INR 25,000 per month. There was a company that came to our college but didn't take any students. The top roles were offered in CSS, C, C+, Python, and Java.
content.Infrastructure: At our college, the B.Tech. building is going well these days. They made the old building new and well maintained, which has new facilities like wi-fi, a water purifier, good furniture, and a good laboratory where we can get good information for our course.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of St.Mary's Technical Campus.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Placements depend on how well the interview goes with the interviewer. The top recruiting company is Rani Constructions. A few students got internships. If you want internships, you must work hard.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a building. They have constructed new academic rooms. The hostel facility is not available in our college. Some PGs are available near our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has bad hostel infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements and companies do not visit our college because of pandemic. Head of our department provided placements from some low-paying companies after passing. Most of them prepared for off-campus placements. Students got placed off campus in many MNCs like TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and Capgemini.
content.Infrastructure: Old hostel campus was below average with high fees. So most of the students who get scholarships stay at the hostel. Food served in the hostel was average. College has a football and a volleyball ground. Laboratory for the CSE department has good infrastructure with good Wi-Fi and subscription to many online learning portals. Library doesn't provide textbooks to the students and many good famous books were not available.

reviews.review_heading: St. Mary's Technical Campus offers the best education at the lowest fee.
reviews.review_text: The college area has Wi-Fi connection, but there is a network issue few times. Labs have enough number of instruments but not AC. Classrooms are developed, and a projector facility is available in classrooms. The library is rich with a lot of books, and there is a perfect environment to study. The college is very much active in sports, and there is a sports department that conducts various activities. Ann...

reviews.review_heading: Waste of money and career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The campus is huge. It is far better than any other college. It has hostels on the campus for both boys and girls. The campus consists of the football ground, 3 boys hostels, one girls' hostels, one canteen, and one indoor stadium.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied for studying in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our facilities are really good and are helpful to the students. Especially, the HOD of our department is very sensible for her students. Each class begins as per the schedule and on right time too.  All the teachers teach us very well,  and they also help the students to get jobs.

reviews.review_heading: In short, our college has good quality teachers and placement, and the infrastructure is way better.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Every classroom has CCTV cameras. There are enough books for every student. The space of the library is big, which helps a lot of students to study at a time. Sports equipment like cricket kit, football, volleyball, etc., we get without any trouble. Every year, the winter sports are held. Every type of games, like kabaddi, race, etc., are held.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for future life. I enjoyed my college days a lot.
reviews.review_text: It is an only technical campus in West Bengal. The technical campus name, the price is high, and so is the maintenance. All the expected facilities are available such as Digital Library, Wi-Fi, Sports room, Auditorium. The types of equipment in the labs are more than needed. I never faced any infrastructure issue apart from power cuts as it is not possible and feasible to run the diesel generator even for a 10 minutes power cut.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members were exceptionally good, but the college isn't.
reviews.review_text:
The Wi-Fi is always available to the hostelers as well as to the day-scholars, and also the library is open to everyone. Though, there aren't many types of equipment put up in the labs, except the computer labs. 
During my tenure, I apparently did face some issues as the labs didn't have proper instruments.

reviews.review_heading: The review of St.Mary's Technical Campus, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructures of St.Mary's Technical Campus, Kolkata is one of the best among all the colleges of Kolkata. There are mainly three blocks on the campus. The corridor, the washroom, the classrooms, the lab facilities are beautifully designed and well-mentioned. You can go through the FB pages and the YouTube videos to know about the college.

reviews.review_heading: Most undesirable "engineering" college to get into. Get only if you are fond of only degree.
reviews.review_text: Most undesirable college from the region Barasat. Where other colleges have proper instruments and machines, they have only 2 lathe, 1 utm and 1 milling machine. Most of them are not in a working condition. Telling about classroom, no such smart classes. They have green boards. The library has no such variety or utilisation.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and has value for money.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food served was very good. The campus was so clean. There were proper serving with manners and classrooms were also very interesting and easy to learn. I enjoyed sports as it was best for a break from studies as well as help me in fun. Library had less books. If there were more books, it would be good.

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons) in Business Analytics (Industry Partner - IBM) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college for those who want to do business management.

content.Placements: The highest package offered has been reported to have gone up to 75 LPA for top-performing students, especially for Computer Science and Engineering. The average package offered is around 6 LPA, while the lowest package range is between 2 and 3 LPA, depending on the company and course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Techno India University is quite well developed and modern. The classrooms are spacious, equipped with a projector and digital boards, and have good Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus. The university provides well-maintained computer labs and department-specific laboratories depending on the course.

individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 70% of our college students got placements. In my knowledge, the highest package is 10 LPA, and the average package is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google and Microsoft. In my course, the roles offered are legal advisory and many others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very sufficient. We have unlimited Wi-Fi and also a great canteen. The college library is also huge and has a variety of books for certain courses. Sports management is also upto the expectation, it provides a lot of opportunities in any sports event occurring.

content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. There are good facilities with a library, labs, and the availability of Wi-Fi on each floor. Good healthy food is available in the mess and canteen of Techno India University. There are also good medical facilities.

review_summary.college_name: George College, George Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good practical learning with supportive faculty and a beautiful college life.

content.Placements: We recently completed our course at George College. Around 80% of students from our course got placed through campus placements. It charges 2.5 lakhs for a 3-year course. All students received internship opportunities in many government hospitals. Mostly, lab technician and phlebotomist roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-equipped laboratories with modern instruments useful for practical learning. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors for presentations. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. The library is good with a decent collection of books related to medical lab technology and other references.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: George Group of Colleges are good and best college in MAKAUT University. It is a better place.

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in my college. The highest package is 15 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Tata Motors, Dell, Vivo, etc., hire students. As freshers, students are welcomed into this college and get nice and perfect placements. And get a higher degree from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. The library is good and disciplined. All technical courses are available in this college like BBA, B.com, B.Voc, Mechanical Engineering, and many more. This college is value for money and the best college I have ever seen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college facilities and the staff members.

content.Placements: 60% of students get placed in our course. Top roles like HR and auditor are offered. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, and Football visit the college to hire students from our course. It has a very good placement cell. If students do well in their semester exams and gain a good CGPA, then for sure they will placed in good company.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and computers are available. The canteen is also available. It has very good facilities. The canteen is not big and it is of small size but you get very good and delicious food. There is enough space for sitting outside the college area. If we feel bored then a park is also available near the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A fine college for those who are looking for affordable options.

content.Placements: I've talked to my seniors who have passed out, and some of them who were actually deserving have gotten fair placements, mostly from reputable companies. Recruiters from reputed and well-known companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Tata, and others visit our college. Almost 30% to 40% of students get internships. Roles in finance, marketing, and HR management are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is built on a quite big area, but the buildings and infrastructure aren't that lavish; it seems more like a government college. Though there's AC in every classroom, and we're provided with computer lab facilities too. There's no canteen, no medical facilities, or any area for sports and games available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: About 65% of students get placed in our college. The salary package offered is 3.5 LPA - 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS and CTS. About 60% of students got internships in TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good. Wi-Fi connections are also good. In every room, we get Wi-Fi. Classrooms are clean. There is no canteen in our college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. The course curriculum is almost relevant. The pass percentage is 85%. Exams are easy. If you want to pass your exam, you have to study carefully. Teachers help us during exams and give suggestions.
